title: Find and download your account statements
text: Monthly statements are available in the app under Documents, then Statements, where you can view or download any period as a PDF. You can also export a custom date range of your transaction history to a CSV or PDF file from the same screen. Statements are generated a few days after each billing cycle closes. If a statement you need is missing, or you require an older record than what's shown, contact support and we can retrieve it for you.
